description_long: This is a round, double-layered chocolate cake with a textured, rustic surface resembling a dense chocolate sponge or chocolate shavings. The cake is topped with eight evenly spaced dollops of white cream, each crowned with a red cherry-like decoration, arranged in a circular pattern. At the center of the cake stands a single, slender, pale yellow candle with a small wick. The cake sits atop a golden-brown, irregularly shaped base that appears to be a cake board or a thick layer of caramel or fondant. The overall appearance is festive and celebratory, suitable for a birthday or special occasion. The cake's surface is matte with a slightly rough texture, and the decorations add a pop of color and visual interest.
description: A round, double-layered chocolate cake with cream and cherry decorations, topped with a single candle and set on a golden-brown base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the candle centered and all eight cream and cherry decorations clearly visible on the cake's top.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view with the candle still prominent and the decorations forming a visible arc, revealing more of the cake's right side.
description_view_2: Rear view with the candle's wick facing forward, showing the back arc of the decorations and the cake's layered texture.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the candle centered and the decorations forming a semi-circle, highlighting the left side of the cake.
